source: Promoted from 3 real Weekly Menu Planner .docx files (residence: Earlwood, June 2026 cycle), analysed 2026-07-04. See FRAME-LEDGER.md row 4.
privacy_note: Real resident names and clinical specifics (medication, weight targets) appeared in source docs but are NOT reproduced here. All resident names below are placeholders pending a privacy footing, per FRAME-LEDGER's standing rule.

organisation.name: PLACEHOLDER_ORG_NAME
organisation.note: SIL service provider Debbie works for; nationwide, estimated ~20-30 homes. Name not yet captured.

dinner_rotation.shared_across_residences: unknown - confirmed only within Earlwood; verify with Debbie
dinner_rotation.source_evidence: identical dinner text across Earlwood's 3 residents for corresponding weeks/days, e.g. all three had the same dish on Monday of week 1

support_worker_field.scope: confirmed for Earlwood only; unknown whether one support worker covers a whole residence or is per-resident elsewhere

dislikes.shape: comma-separated food items, paragraph before the week heading

may_include: medical directives (weight targets, medication timing, exercise mandates)

sil_day_flag.type: per-day marker, currently embedded in the day-column header text rather than a structured field
observed_patterns: rotates week to week (different days flagged each of the 4 weeks)
fixed set of days every week (e.g. always Tue/Thu/Sat/Sun)
absent entirely (no SIL flag on any day)

community_participation_marker.type: inline prefix within a meal cell, not a separate column
community_participation_marker.note: three different spellings/conventions across 3 residents - needs a normalisation decision before generation

conditional_substitution.type: prose rule embedded in a cell

running_quota.type: prose rule embedded in a cell, tracking a daily/weekly cap
running_quota.example_pattern: (only if under N for the day)

eat_out_placeholder.type: cell value delegating the meal to an outing or support worker instead of specifying food

residences.name: Earlwood
residences.status: populated - source data available (3 real residents, anonymised here)

constraint_block.sil_day_pattern: absent - no SIL flag on any day

residences.name: Berala
residences.status: unbuilt - no source data, placeholder residents only

residences.name: Burwood
residences.status: unbuilt - no source data, placeholder residents only

residences.name: Blacktown
residences.status: unbuilt - no source data, placeholder residents only

residences.name: Mascot
residences.status: unbuilt - no source data, placeholder residents only

open_questions: Total number of residences nationwide (estimated 20-30) and their names
Whether the dinner rotation is shared across residences or only within one
Whether footer lineage A/B reflects two real template versions across the company, or a one-off drift in a single document
Whether one support worker (like Debbie) covers a whole residence, or plans are created per-resident by different staff
How many residents typically live in one SIL home (Earlwood = 3; unconfirmed as typical)
Privacy/consent footing for using real resident names and health data in any generated artifact
